shortDescription: Professional trading platform with real-time charts, alerts, and paper trading
fullDescription:
Marlin Traders brings institutional-grade trading tools to everyone. Get real-time streaming charts with 50+ technical indicators, customizable multi-chart layouts, smart price alerts, and paper trading -- all in one app.

Key Features:

- Real-Time Charts: Candlestick, line, and bar charts powered by high-performance rendering with pinch-to-zoom and crosshair inspection
- 50+ Technical Indicators: SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands, Ichimoku, VWAP, and dozens more with full customization
- Smart Alerts: Set price alerts with push notifications and email delivery. Never miss a move
- Watchlists: Organize symbols into multiple lists with sparkline previews and swipe actions
- Paper Trading: Practice strategies risk-free with simulated market, limit, and stop orders
- Portfolio Tracking: Monitor positions, P&L, and recent orders at a glance
- Dark Theme: Designed for extended trading sessions with a professional navy-black interface
- Cross-Platform: Seamless experience across web and mobile

Whether you are a day trader, swing trader, or long-term investor, Marlin Traders gives you the tools the pros use -- without the professional price tag.

Free tier includes 10 indicators per chart, 100 alerts, and full paper trading access.

releaseNotes.en-US: Initial release of Marlin Traders for Android. Includes real-time charting, 50+ indicators, watchlists, price alerts, and paper trading.
